title: <div>- Makes it easier for teams to understand which commandments guide specific
content:
- Makes it easier for teams to understand which commandments guide specific decisions

### Include Metrics or Observability
- Add a principle around observability: "Track and communicate the health and adoption of org-wide processes"
- Ensure feedback loops exist so teams can report what's working and what isn't

### Strengthen the "Regular Review" Process
- Define "regularly" more specifically (e.g., quarterly reviews, annual deep-dive)
- Establish who owns this review process (maintainers, steering committee, etc.)
- Create a template for "Lessons Learned" documentation

### Link to Enforcement
- Reference how these principles will be enforced in issue templates, PR reviews, and automation
- Add a note: "When decisions conflict with these commandments, reference the specific principle in discussions"

These additions would make the commandments not just aspirational, but operational—with clear mechanisms for versioning, deprecation, and evolution.
context: From document: :Based on the pull request at https://github.com/ivi374forivi/petasum… — chunk 18 (chunk 18/19)
